title: Bubble Planet Collection
description: Will replace mobs with alternative versions of @Bubble_Planet0. 🌎
body:
If you are bored with the dull designs of mythological mobs, then this resource pack will replace their appearance with designs from the Minecraft animator [Bubble Planet X(Twitter)](https://x.com/bubble_planet0)!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6a72320ff24d41f2b1f9468b577b4285f5ed1ed.png)

At the moment the resource pack replaces only 5 mobs. namely Creeper, Enderman, Evoker, Piglin and Skeleton!

Also, if you want to dive deeper into these designs, you should install the additional resource pack [Yuushya 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/yuushya-16x)!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f43d9e0e147a69a84f797efe53d108638f740e7.png)

This resource pack will be rarely updated due to personal problems in real life of the author of the resource pack

Thank you for your attention!
